properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v2 v3 v4 v6 v3 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: What do you see when you look at your world today? Is it so full of clutter that you feel like you're going insane? And you can't fight back'cause you're just too afraid And it seems like the clouds in your sky don't wanna change

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You see there's always another story, another side to every coin And how you see your circumstance is all about a choice

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When you see the rushing wind, feel the pouring rain Hear the thunder now as the clouds roll in You're blinded by the lightning Do you also hear that still, small voice saying?

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: "It's okay, you're not alone You may be scared to death but I won't let you go" You may think the sky above is falling But can you hear Jesus calling?

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: What do you see when you look at your world today? Do you see a glimmer of hope or has it all turned to gray? Well, start by counting your blessings one by one And I'm sure right there, you'll start to see the sun

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Oh, calling out to you Because the darker the night, the brighter He can shine

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: "It's okay, you're not alone You may be scared to death but I won't let you go" You may think the sky above is falling Well, you may think the sky above is falling But can you hear Jesus calling?

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: He’s calling, He’s calling Calling out to you
